title: Case Study Brief — pgp_orlando
body:
**Case Study Brief: pgp_orlando**

**Challenge**: Prior to implementing EPOS, pgp_orlando faced inefficiencies in their inventory management and sales tracking processes. Manual data entry and lack of real-time visibility led to stock discrepancies, missed sales opportunities, and prolonged customer wait times.

**Solution**: We implemented a customized EPOS system for pgp_orlando, integrating inventory management, sales tracking, and customer relationship management modules. Our solution included:
- Streamlined inventory tracking and automated stock alerts
- Real-time sales reporting and analytics
- Personalized customer loyalty programs

**Results**: Following EPOS implementation, pgp_orlando experienced:
- 25% reduction in inventory discrepancies
- 15% increase in average transaction value
- 30% decrease in customer wait times
- 20% growth in customer loyalty program participation
By leveraging our EPOS solution, pgp_orlando improved operational efficiency, enhanced customer satisfaction, and drove business growth.
